title: [VectorCombine] foldPermuteOfIntrinsic - support multiple uses of shuffled ops
author: raventid

comments.author: raventid
comments.body: This PR includes an insignificant amount of clang-format changes unrelated to a primary change. Let me know if you consider this to be prohibitive I'll roll them back.

comments.author: github-actions[bot]
